cases.prompt: I need to set up Laravel Pulse to monitor slow queries, exceptions, and queue performance in production.
cases.expect: pulse-setup skill activates and guides through installing laravel/pulse, configuring recorders, and setting up the monitoring dashboard.

cases.prompt: Add performance monitoring to track slow requests and cache interactions with Redis-backed ingest.
cases.expect: pulse-setup skill activates and covers recorder configuration, Redis ingest driver setup, and worker scheduling.
